requirement: The system should respond quickly to user inputs.
The application must handle a large number of users.
The interface should be user-friendly and intuitive.
The system may send email notifications when an order is placed.
The application could allow users to export data in CSV format.
Users might be able to customize their dashboard layout.
The system shall authenticate users via OAuth 2.0 before granting access to protected resources.
The API shall return a response within 200 milliseconds for 95% of requests under normal load.
The system shall encrypt all stored passwords using bcrypt with a minimum cost factor of 12.
The system should be secure.
The platform must provide good performance under stress.
Data should be processed in a timely manner.
The system may optionally support dark mode in the user interface.
Logging could be enabled for debugging purposes.
The system shall log every failed login attempt with timestamp, IP address, and username.
The database shall support up to 10,000 concurrent connections.
The system must be easy to maintain.
Reports should look professional and be generated efficiently.
The application should work well on mobile devices.
The system might allow administrators to override user permissions.
The backup process could run during off-peak hours.
The application shall display search results within 1 second for queries returning up to 500 records.
Each user session shall expire after 30 minutes of inactivity.
The system should ensure adequate data protection.
The software needs to be reliable.
Error messages should be clear and helpful to the user.
The system may provide an optional two-factor authentication mechanism.
The system shall reject any uploaded file exceeding 10 MB and return error code 413.
The API shall use TLS 1.2 or higher for all external communications.
The notification module should deliver messages reasonably fast.
